news.headline: Aizip and SoftBank partner to bring AI to aquaculture, winning CES® 2025 Innovation Award, enhancing real-time analysis.
news.summary: SoftBank and Aizip have collaborated to introduce AI technology to the aquaculture sector, based in Cupertino, California. This partnership aims to facilitate real-time analysis within aquaculture settings marked by limited connectivity. This initiative promises to revolutionize the industry by enabling efficient monitoring and decision-making processes.

news.headline: EIA Gasoline Inventories Actual 5.086M (Forecast 1.2M, Previous 2.362M)
EIA Crude Cushing Inventories Actual -1.298M (Forecast -, Previous 0.050M)
EIA Distillate Inventories Actual 3.235M (Forecast 1M, Previous 3.383M)
EIA Crude Oil Inventories Actual -1.425M (Forecast -1.1M, Previous -5.073M)
Bitcoin price has hit new heights in 2024, with a high of $103,900.47 but now wavering around $100,000. Poll predicts $105,000 or $85,000 next.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) in 2024 has seen a significant rise due to various factors such as the introduction of Bitcoin ETFs, increased adoption by businesses, and anticipation of a crypto-friendly White House administration with Donald Trump's victory in the 2024 presidential election. Following multiple peaks, Bitcoin surged past $80,000, $90,000, and ultimately hit an all-time high of $103,900.47 on Dec. 4. Despite maintaining levels above $100,000 for some time, Bitcoin experienced a decrease leading it below this milestone. In a recent poll by Benzinga, readers were asked to forecast Bitcoin's next move with options between reaching $105,000 or falling to $85,000. The outcome of the poll is undisclosed.

news.headline: BTC price levels stabilize near $100,000 amidst market fluctuations after hitting an ATH of $104,000. Positive signs indicate a potential bullish trend ahead.
news.summary: The value of Bitcoin climbed past $100,000, peaking at an unprecedented $104,000 before undergoing a notable drop. Analyses of market trends and economic factors indicate a possibility of the upward momentum persisting.

news.headline: Wall Street gains as inflation data firms up Fed's next interest rate cut; CPI rose 2.7% YoY in November. Tesla hits all-time highs. Fed rate cut probability surges to 96%.
news.summary: On a positive note, Wall Street started Wednesday with November inflation data matching expectations, indicating a Federal Reserve interest rate cut next week is likely. The Consumer Price Index showed a 2.7% year-over-year increase in November, slightly higher than October's 2.6%, but in line with economist forecasts. Core inflation, excluding volatile categories, held steady at a 3.3% annual rate, meeting expectations. Following the report, the likelihood of a 25-basis-point rate cut at the Fed's Dec. 18 meeting jumped to 96%, up from 86% prior to the data release as per CME FedWatch. This signals investors are largely anticipating a central bank easing move.

news.headline: Biden adviser: Incomes rising faster than prices in response to CPI, which reported a 4.2% surge.
Women's Lacrosse League introduces 4 teams: Boston Guard, NY Charging, Maryland Charm, and California Palms, set to debut in 2025 championship series.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on December 11, 2024, the Women's Lacrosse League (WLL) announced the introduction of its first four teams: the Boston Guard, New York Charging, Maryland Charm, and California Palms. These particular teams were chosen after a thorough evaluation of market considerations like broadcast reach and fan engagement.

news.headline: Theresa Antoniello appointed President & CEO of GMA International in Miami, succeeding her father Gino.
news.summary: In Miami, Florida on December 11, 2024, GMA International (GMAI), a prominent consulting and project management company in the mass transit sector, has named Theresa Kelli Antoniello as its new President & CEO. Taking over from her father Gino, she will lead the company's operations moving forward.

news.headline: Winnebago Industries named one of America's Most Responsible Companies for the third year in a row by Newsweek.
news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, on December 11, 2024, Winnebago Industries, Inc. (NYSE: WGO), a prominent outdoor recreation products manufacturer, was announced as one of America's Most Responsible Companies 2025 by Newsweek. This marks the third consecutive year that Winnebago Industries has earned this recognition for its robust corporate social responsibility endeavors and outstanding dedication to environmental, social, and corporate governance (ESG) initiatives.

news.headline: Apple introduces new Apple Intelligence features with iOS 18.2, iPadOS 18.2, and macOS Sequoia 15.2, focusing on privacy in AI and enhancing user experience.
news.summary: In Cupertino, California, Apple unveiled the launch of iOS 18.2, iPadOS 18.2, and macOS Sequoia 15.2. These updates bring a fresh array of Apple Intelligence™ features enhancing the user experience on iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Apple Intelligence is a user-friendly personal intelligence system that offers useful insights, focusing on privacy in AI advancements. This release builds upon the initial capabilities introduced before. Users can benefit from these advancements on their Apple devices.

news.headline: Econse Water Technologies aids fire hydrant manufacturer in conserving water, enhancing safety and efficiency. LOCKPORT, N.Y., Dec. 11, 2024.
news.summary: A well-known fire hydrant manufacturer based in LOCKPORT, N.Y. sought the expertise of Econse Water Technologies to enhance water conservation during their hydrant testing operations. This collaboration began on Dec. 11, 2024. Econse identified further prospects for improvement beyond water management, showcasing their ability to capitalize on windows of opportunity.

news.headline: Material Capital Partners secures financing for 170-unit rental home community in Brunswick, Georgia.
news.summary: On December 11, 2024, Material Capital Partners, a real estate development and investment management company located in Charleston, South Carolina, disclosed the completion of project financing for River Ford. This rental home community, situated in Brunswick, Georgia, will consist of 170 units.

news.headline: Beezie transforms collectibles industry with innovative tools, gamification. Supports resellers of trading cards, sneakers, watches, and memorabilia. Benefits from successful beta testing and aims to streamline operations for resellers.
news.summary: In Boston, Beezie, a prominent platform in the industry of collectible watches, is making waves by introducing cutting-edge tools and fun features aimed at simplifying tasks, increasing revenue possibilities, and enhancing interactions with collectors. Following a successful beta phase, Beezie is now available to assist resellers dealing with valuable collectibles such as trading cards, sneakers, watches, and memorabilia. This platform offers a secure, scalable, and smooth reselling process to cater to the needs of collectors, ultimately transforming the collectibles market.

news.headline: Court drops Nvidia securities fraud case; Justices dismiss the case as "improvidently granted," ending proceedings.
news.summary: In a legal decision without a signature, the judges rejected the lawsuit against the technology corporation, deeming it "improvidently granted." This indicates they believe it was an error to have accepted the case for consideration.

news.headline: EU envoys agree to a 15th sanctions package against Russia, targeting Russia's shadow fleet.
Premise Health marks 10th year as a brand and 60 years in healthcare, largest provider partnering with employers and unions.
news.summary: In December 2024, Premise Health in Brentwood, Tennessee marks a decade as a brand and commemorates its 60-year history as a healthcare provider. As the leading direct healthcare provider in the country, Premise collaborates with employers and unions to deliver essential services.

news.headline: Inventor from Deerfield Beach, Fla. creates HANGIN HELPER for wall art, providing easy & secure hanging system.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Deerfield Beach, Florida, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the HANGIN HELPER. The inventor aimed to provide a straightforward and effective solution for displaying wall art or photographs. The innovative design of the HANGIN HELPER offers a secure and convenient method for hanging decorative items.

news.headline: Inventor from Guam creates new baby carrier The Parent Prop to prevent arm strain. (SBT-1975)
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 11, 2024, an inventor from Santa Rita, Guam shared his inspiration for creating a new carrier named THE PARENT PROP. The inventor, who recently became a father, wanted a solution to support his infant daughter more comfortably and alleviate arm strain. The carrier aims to provide a better alternative for parents in caring for their infants. The product is designed to offer enhanced support and reduce physical strain commonly experienced during prolonged baby-carrying sessions.

news.headline: GNT Pharma's Phase 3 drug Nelonemdaz™ shows significant improvements in stroke patients, IND submitted to FDA.
news.summary: A recent submission to the FDA by IND showcased notable enhancements in patient outcome when administered within 70 minutes of Emergency Room admission. Following this, multinational Phase 3 Clinical Trial procedures have been confirmed and commenced at prominent stroke research centers worldwide. This initiative is currently underway in SEOUL, South Korea.

news.headline: Scientific Games secures NBA deal for lottery scratch games in the U.S., enhancing portfolios with licensed properties.
news.summary: Scientific Games has achieved a significant milestone by securing a new license from the National Basketball Association (NBA), marking a major success for their lottery game portfolios. This latest addition further enhances the company's licensed properties portfolio, solidifying their position in the industry. The NBA-licensed instant scratch games are expected to bring in a substantial revenue stream for Scientific Games. The development comes as the company looks to capitalize on the growing popularity of sports-themed lottery games. This move underscores Scientific Games' commitment to innovation and diversification in the gaming sector.

news.headline: Red Tree Builders | Alair Asheville awarded DOE Innovation Award for 4th year in a row.
news.summary: In Asheville, North Carolina, on December 11, 2024, Red Tree Builders | Alair Asheville was honored with the 2024 Department of Energy (DOE) Innovation Award for the fourth year in a row. This prestigious recognition marks a significant achievement for Red Tree Builders | Alair, showcasing their ongoing dedication to innovation and sustainability.

news.headline: Global cybersecurity market to exceed USD 375 billion by 2031 due to rising cyber threats, driven by increasing cyberattacks.
news.summary: Rising cyberattacks are propelling the expansion of the worldwide cybersecurity sector, with businesses and governments pouring significant funds into strong security measures. The heightened frequency and complexity of cyber threats are key drivers behind this growth. Moreover, the swift uptake of digital technologies is further boosting the market. As a result, the global cybersecurity market is projected to reach substantial figures in the near future.

news.headline: E-cigarette and vape market to reach $182.87 billion by 2030 with 15.2% CAGR, driven by health awareness and innovation.
news.summary: Rising health awareness among consumers is fueling the e-cigarette and vape market, with many turning to vaping as a less harmful option compared to conventional smoking. The market is also benefitting from technological innovations in device creation, expanded flavor choices, and diverse nicotine offerings. These factors have led to significant growth, with the market witnessing a surge in sales numbers and a noticeable increase in user adoption rates globally.

news.headline: Hilton Grand Vacations & Boys & Girls Clubs of Central Florida launch youth golf clinic with World Long Drive Champion.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (NYSE:HGV) has introduced a youth golf clinic program in collaboration with Boys & Girls Clubs of Central Florida. The program, designed in partnership with World Long Drive Champion Maurice Allen, aims to provide valuable lessons for young participants to excel in golf and in life. This six-week clinic series focuses on empowering youth with essential skills on and off the course. Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. is dedicated to fostering the development of the local community by offering this innovative program.

news.headline: Morpheus launches $20M rewards for AI compute providers to support decentralized AI ecosystem with MOR token. 5,000+ holders.
news.summary: Morpheus, a platform for deploying AI-driven "Smart Agents," has introduced a $20 million reward program for compute providers. This initiative comes after the platform launched Morpheus' compute smart contracts on the mainnet, aiming to boost contributions to its decentralized AI ecosystem. The rewards, given in the platform's MOR token, target compute providers hosting AI large language models (LLMs) to enhance network support. The MOR token is currently available on Aerodrome, Uniswap, and CoinEx, offering holders a portion of the network's daily compute operations. With more than 5,000 token holders, Morpheus looks to grow its decentralized community.

news.headline: Global industrial agitators market to reach $3.99 billion by 2029, with CAGR of 5.2% from 2024, valued at $3.10 billion.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, the worldwide industrial agitators market is forecasted to reach a value of USD 3.10 billion by 2024 and is anticipated to increase to USD 3.99 billion by 2029. The market is projected to exhibit a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.2% from 2024 to 2029. This information comes from a recent report that detailed the market's growth trajectory.

news.headline: TEDCO unveils 14 Equitech Growth Fund awardees promoting Maryland's ecosystem and workforce development.
news.summary: Fourteen Maryland projects have been awarded grants through TEDCO's Equitech Growth Fund to support the growth of the state's ecosystem and workforce development. The announcement was made in Columbia, Md., on December 11, 2024. TEDCO, known as Maryland's economic engine for technology companies, revealed the recipients for the initial round of funding. The Equitech Growth Fund awarded a total of 14 grants to support these projects.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index: 74/100 = Greed
Fear and Greed Index: 50/100 = Neutral
Ayar Labs secures $155 million led by Advent Global Opportunities and Light Street Capital, total funding now at $370 million.
news.summary: In California, Ayar Labs, a prominent provider of optical interconnect solutions for extensive AI tasks, has recently disclosed securing $155 million in funding in a financing round spearheaded by Advent Global Opportunities and Light Street Capital. The objective behind this substantial investment is to tackle the bottleneck in AI caused by data movement using their optical I/O technology. With this latest infusion, the total funds raised by the company amount to $370 million, propelling its valuation to over $1 billion. The funding round has garnered attention due to its size and the quality of investors involved.

news.headline: Diodes Inc introduces 36-channel automotive-compliant linear LED driver, AL5887Q, enabling brand differentiation with unique lighting patterns.
news.summary: A new 36-channel automotive-compliant linear LED current driver has been launched by Diodes Incorporated, listed as DIOD on Nasdaq. The AL5887Q model is capable of driving RGB configurations and individual LEDs, catering to the demand for car manufacturers to set their brands apart by allowing designers to craft various animated lighting patterns and color depths for both interior and exterior lights. This simplifies the design process for what were previously intricate lighting setups.

news.headline: Augmedics appoints Paul Ziegler as President and CEO, with Gwen Watanabe transitioning to Vice Chair. Ziegler brings 20 years of experience in medical devices.
news.summary: In Chicago, Augmedics, a leader in augmented reality (AR) surgical navigation, has appointed Paul Ziegler as the President and Chief Executive Officer. Ziegler, a veteran in the medical device industry for two decades, brings expertise in commercial and operational areas to the company. Previously serving as interim CEO, Gwen Watanabe will now transition to Vice Chair of the Board. The transition comes as Augmedics enters a new phase, with Ziegler leading the company's growth strategy.

news.headline: G2 enhances software marketplace with AI innovations for multilingual localization, streamlined workflows, and agents.
news.summary: The major software marketplace, G2, based in Chicago, has introduced innovative AI-powered features to enhance the buyer journey and provide new opportunities for sellers. These new updates include multilingual localization, streamlined workflows, and agents, aiming to improve the overall user experience. By utilizing AI technology, G2 aims to facilitate product and service research and create a more efficient platform for buyers and sellers to connect. This move builds upon existing AI features and underscores G2's commitment to leveraging technology to enhance user interactions.

news.headline: Investment: $8M for 2.5 years of development, leading to launch of new B2TRADER offering crypto spot, derivatives, Forex, CFDs.
news.summary: In Dubai, B2BROKER has achieved a significant milestone with the expansion of its B2TRADER platform. Since launching the initial development plan in 2022 and introducing the first version of the crypto trading platform in March 2024, the company has invested $8 million over two and a half years in further enhancement. The new version now supports crypto spot, crypto derivatives, Forex, and CFDs, making it a true multi-asset, multi-market trading platform. This development involved a team of 50 engineers.

news.headline: Warning about dangers of humans taking pet medications due to cost difference and similarities.
news.summary: Pet toxicology specialists are cautioning people about potential hazards regarding medications. Some pet medications may seem similar to human medications, but a few are notably cheaper. This discrepancy raises concerns about the safety and effectiveness of these medications for pets.Experts suggest that people should be cautious when administering medications to their pets due to potential risks of toxicity. It's important to consult with a veterinarian before giving any medication to pets.。

news.headline: By 2031, the electronic waste recycling market is projected to reach $84.3 billion, as per a report by Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: In Redding, California, on December 11, 2024, a recent market study was released on the "Electronic Waste Recycling Market." This report delves into various aspects such as Material Type including Metals, Plastics, and Glass, as well as Recycling Technology like Pyrometallurgy and Hydrometallurgy. The report provides insights on the Size, Share, Forecast, and Trends Analysis of the market. It examines the recycling of electronic waste, a growing concern in the modern world. The study discusses how different materials are recycled and the technologies used, offering valuable data for industry players.

news.headline: GDS Wealth Management in DFW named one of D Magazine's 2024 Top Wealth Managers, recognized nationally.
news.summary: Located in the DFW metroplex, GDS Wealth Management has been recognized as one of D Magazine's top wealth managers in 2024. This prestigious award signifies the company's commitment to excellence in the field. D Magazine conducted a thorough review reaching out to all wealth management firms and teams to compile this exclusive list, solidifying GDS Wealth Management's position as a leading firm in the industry. This acknowledgment reflects the dedication and success of GDS Wealth Management, showcasing their prominence in the financial world.

news.headline:
New Political Trade Reported: DWAC - Sell - spouse - $1,000 - $15,000 -  - Morgan McGarvey 
 transaction date: 2024-11-08 
 filed at date: 2024-12-10
Strong AI growth in Q4 cloud revealed by Liftr Insights data. Global increase in AI options and costs.
news.summary: Liftr Insights, a market intelligence firm, has released data showcasing the rapid expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) worldwide. The report, based on objective numbers, reveals significant growth in AI utilization in the cloud sector. According to the data published on December 11, 2024, from Austin, Texas, AI options and associated costs have seen substantial increases. This reinforces the trend of AI playing a vital role in the global market landscape, underscoring the importance of this technology in various industries.

news.headline: Danbury to get GoNetspeed's 100% fiber internet in 2025 through $7.6 million investment, benefiting 14,300+ homes and businesses.
news.summary: In Danbury, Connecticut, GoNetspeed has revealed plans to extend its 100% fiber-optic network to the community. The city will benefit from high-speed, symmetrical internet thanks to GoNetspeed's $7.6 million private investment in the project. Construction is set to commence in early 2025, with over 14,300 homes and businesses in Danbury gaining access to the advanced fiber technology once the work is finished. This initiative aims to provide residents and businesses in the area with reliable and efficient internet services.

news.headline: Clear Peak Capital partners with ITsynch, a fleet management software provider for cruise and maritime industries. CEO: Alejandro Oscar De Carli, COO: Jorge de la Cruz.
news.summary: Clear Peak Capital, a private equity firm based in Orlando, Florida, has partnered with ITsynch, a prominent provider of fleet management software solutions catering to the cruise and maritime sectors. ITsynch, led by CEO Alejandro Oscar De Carli and COO Jorge de la Cruz, has reached a significant stage with this collaboration. Clear Peak's focus on software and IT services aligns with ITsynch's growth goals in offering innovative solutions. This cooperation is a strategic move for ITsynch, underlining its dedication to advancing in the industry.

news.headline: RESOLVE 2024 event in Abu Dhabi concluded with impactful sessions on global dispute resolution, as part of Abu Dhabi Finance Week.
news.summary: Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates - On December 11, 2024, the much-awaited RESOLVE 2024 event, organized by ADGM Courts and the ADGM Dispute Resolution Hearing Centre (DHRC), wrapped up on the second day of Abu Dhabi Finance Week (ADFW). The event saw significant discussions on global dispute resolution, attracting a large audience.

news.headline: XRP has surged 10.25% in 24hrs to $2.41, contrasting the 7% week-long loss from $2.57. All-time high is $3.40.
news.summary: The price of XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has risen by 10.25% in the last 24 hours to reach $2.41, marking a shift from the previous week where it had dropped by 7.0% from $2.57. Currently, the coin's all-time high is at $3.40. The chart illustrating the price fluctuations and volatility can be found in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: GE Vernova projects $36-$37 billion in revenues for 2025, with focus on organic investments and shareholder returns. Challenges noted in wind sector.
news.summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) held its 2024 Investor Update event on Tuesday to share its financial projections and capital allocation plan. CFO Ken Parks stated their commitment to maintaining an investment grade balance sheet while investing in organic growth, targeted M&A, and returning at least one-third of cash generation to shareholders through dividends and share repurchases. The company predicts revenues for 2025 to range between $36 billion and $37 billion, slightly below the consensus of $37.25 billion, reflecting mid-single-digit organic growth. Additionally, recent economic challenges and Trump's presidency have led to a tougher outlook for renewable energy stocks, according to Morgan Stanley. For more details, the complete report is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dwight Capital & Dwight Mortgage Trust finance $260.5MM in November with notable transactions including a $51.8MM HUD loan for Integra Isles Apartments.
news.summary: In Miami, Dwight Capital and its affiliate REIT, Dwight Mortgage Trust (DMT), finalized real estate financings totaling $260.5 million in November. Key deals comprised a HUD loan for Integra Isles Apartments, alongside bridge loans for Willow Creek Apartments and a trio of skilled nursing facilities. A significant transaction involved a $51.8 million HUD 221(d)(4) construction loan for the construction of Integra Isles, a forthcoming 264-unit market rate apartment complex.

news.headline: Cetera welcomes $231M AUA team to Summit Financial Networks in San Diego. Three members from Scottsdale join from MML Investors Services.
news.summary: A team of three financial professionals operating under the name allwealth Planning in Scottsdale has recently transitioned from MML Investors Services to join Cetera Financial Group in San Diego. This move transpired on December 11, 2024. Cetera Financial Group, known as the leading financial advisor Wealth Hub, welcomed the three-member team to its platform.

news.headline: Oomnitza enhances IT Asset Management platform with new features to maximize efficiency, ensure security, and unlock profitability.
news.summary: A modern IT Asset Management platform called Oomnitza, based in San Francisco, unveiled new features on December 11, 2024. These features aim to boost business efficiency, enhance information security, and drive profitability through technology asset management. The updates promise to deliver measurable value to businesses by optimizing processes.
